title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.090 - Deputies — oaths — qualifications
text:
60.090.  Deputies — oaths — qualifications. — Deputies may be appointed by any county surveyor who, before they proceed to discharge their duties, shall take an oath to discharge faithfully, truly and well the duties of deputy surveyors.  All deputy county surveyors shall be registered land surveyors.
(RSMo 1939 § 13208, A.L. 1989 H.B. 190, et al.) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11589; 1919 § 12727; 1909 § 11309
